ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformation record */,
  "trans_x" REAL /* Translation value along the X-axis */,
  "trans_y" REAL /* Translation value along the Y-axis */,
  "trans_z" REAL /* Translation value along the Z-axis */,
  "rot_x" REAL /* Rotation value around the X-axis */,
  "rot_y" REAL /* Rotation value around the Y-axis */,
  "rot_z" REAL /* Rotation value around the Z-axis */,
  "rot_w" REAL /* Rotation value around the W-axis (quaternion) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device or sensor that captured the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data capture */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device or sensor */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the captured data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the data was captured */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who captured or uploaded the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transformation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each transformation record
ID of the device or sensor that captured the data
Type of the device or sensor
Geographical location where the data was captured
ID of the user who captured or uploaded the data
Date and time of the last login
